theme.vibe: Gen Z Nightlife, Exclusive, High-Energy, Minimalist, Tactile

typography.anti_pattern_rule: No standard Inter or Roboto for headings. Embracing character and tension.

font_families.mono_accent: Azeret Mono (For live counts, distances, time)

spacing_and_layout.system: Generous spacing. Tailwind scale heavily leaning on p-6, p-8, p-12 for breathing room.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Used for user profiles (Interests, Stats, Bio broken into masonry/bento blocks rather than pure lists)

primary.style: bg-[#E1FF00] text-black rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold text-lg
primary.interaction: Scale down on press (Spring physics), Haptic impact (Medium)

secondary_glass.style: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 backdrop-blur-md font-medium

action_circular.style: w-16 h-16 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center bg-[#141419] border border-white/10

venue_card.layout: Large vertical card (h-[400px]), image background, heavy bottom gradient overlay.
venue_card.live_badge: Top right absolute position. Glowing Volt Yellow dot + Mono text 'LIVE (142)'.
venue_card.typography: Bottom left absolute: Venue Name (H2), Distance + Vibe (Body Secondary).

profile_card.layout: Edge-to-edge screen minus safe areas, stacked images like a deck of cards.
profile_card.overlay: Dark gradient at bottom 30% to protect text contrast.
profile_card.actions: Floating action bar overlapping the bottom of the card.

live_indicator.style: Pulsing ring animation using Reanimated, strictly Volt Yellow to indicate physical presence/proximity.

onboarding.visuals: Full screen looping background video of blurred nightlife scenes (dark).
onboarding.content: Massive typography 'Break the ice nearby.' at top.
onboarding.actions: Bottom-docked Volt Yellow 'Enter the Club' (Auth) button.

home_venues.header: Sticky Top, glassmorphism. 'Where are you tonight?' (H1).
home_venues.content: Vertical scroll of Venue Cards. No horizontal carousels (too generic). Full-width cards with generous gap-6.
home_venues.interaction: Parallax effect on venue background images during scroll.

check_in_flow.step_1: GPS Validation Map (Dark mode map styling, pure black water/roads, glowing neon pin).
check_in_flow.step_2: Live Selfie Camera View. Circular mask with a sweeping neon scanner effect. 'Prove you are here.'
check_in_flow.success: Screen flash, Haptic Success, 'You're IN' massive typography.

live_feed.layout: Grid of profile thumbnails currently checked into the venue.
live_feed.cards: Tapping a thumbnail expands to the full Profile Card view (Shared Element Transition).

match_animation.visuals: Screen goes void black. Two profile avatars collide. Massive text 'IT'S A BUMP 💥' in neon fuchsia.
match_animation.motion: Heavy haptic feedback, screen shake, particle explosion effect (using Lottie or Skia).

chat.list: Clean list, avatars with Volt Yellow rings if currently in the same venue.
chat.thread: Dark interface. Sent bubbles: glassmorphism white/10. Received bubbles: Volt Yellow/10 with Volt Yellow border. Very cyber-minimal.

motion_and_interactions.transitions: Shared Element Transitions for photos. Fade-through for tabs.
motion_and_interactions.micro_interactions: Haptic feedback on ALL major actions (swipes, likes, check-ins). App must feel highly tactile.
motion_and_interactions.swipe_physics: Heavy spring configuration. Swiping should feel weighty, not loose.

venues.description: Blue lighted room - Use for abstract backgrounds or venue headers
Checkered floor, dimly lit lounge - Use for premium lounge venue cards

profiles.description: Woman standing beside neon light - Gen Z profile picture example
Woman in black high-neck jacket - Moody lighting profile picture
Men's portrait, moody - Profile picture example

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a React Native Expo app. Translate Tailwind classes (like p-6, bg-white/5) into React Native StyleSheet or NativeWind equivalents.
Use 'react-native-reanimated' for all complex animations (live rings, swipe cards, matches).
Use 'expo-haptics' extensively to match the tactile vibe requested in the guidelines.
For the Match Animation, use heavy haptics and a full-screen absolute positioned view with an explosion effect.
Ensure dark mode is locked. Do not build a light mode theme.
Never use placeholder URLs (e.g. via.placeholder.com). Use the provided Unsplash URLs in the media_assets section for initial seed data or mocks.
